name: @rodrigopjax/dockup
description: Professional Docker deploy CLI — build, push, and generate compose artifacts from *.dockup.json

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test test/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --import tsx --test test/unit/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --import tsx --test test/integration/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node --import tsx --test test/e2e/**/*.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm test && npm run lint

author: Rodrigo Pereira <rodrigopjax@users.noreply.github.com>
